message.ecclientsettings.action_failed: The client action could not be saved; the previous setting is still active
message.ecclientsettings.profile.recover: %s Profile recovery warning(s) were recorded; see the log for preserved file paths
message.ecclientsettings.profile.stale_d: The active Profile changed; reopen settings before saving
message.ecclientsettings.settings.save_f: Settings could not be saved. Your draft has been kept.
Changes only local lightmap inputs; it never changes the saved brightness option or potion effects.
option.ecclientsettings.fullbright.stren: Blends from vanilla at 0.0 to the selected local brightness effect at 1.0.
option.ecclientsettings.block_outline.co: Sets the outline's alpha and RGB color without changing its shape, width, reach, or depth behavior.
option.ecclientsettings.block_outline.en: Recolors the vanilla outline of the block you are targeting.
option.ecclientsettings.low_fire.enabled: Moves only the vanilla first-person fire overlay downward.
Recolors only the existing vanilla hurt overlay, including its transparency.
option.ecclientsettings.hit_color.enable: Uses vanilla hurt timing, visibility, and depth rules for every visible hurt entity.
option.ecclientsettings.time_changer.cus: Visible day-cycle time from 0 to 23999, used by Custom mode.
option.ecclientsettings.time_changer.mod: Changes only the local sky time and keeps tracking server time for accurate restoration.
option.ecclientsettings.zoom.animation_s: Controls smooth transition duration from 1 (slow) to 10 (fast).
option.ecclientsettings.zoom.divisor.too: Base FOV divisor from 1 to 16; larger values zoom in farther.
option.ecclientsettings.zoom.enabled.too: Enables the rebindable Zoom action without changing saved camera options.
option.ecclientsettings.zoom.max_divisor: Upper zoom limit for scroll adjustment, from the base divisor to 32.
option.ecclientsettings.zoom.reduce_sens: Temporarily scales turn sensitivity through NeoForge's turn event.
option.ecclientsettings.zoom.scroll_adju: Consumes vertical scrolling only while Zoom is active and the divisor changes.
option.ecclientsettings.zoom.smooth_came: Temporarily enables cinematic turn smoothing without changing the saved option.
option.ecclientsettings.force_sprint.too: Automatically attempts to sprint while moving forward and still follows vanilla sprint restrictions.
option.ecclientsettings.profile.name: Profile name
option.ecclientsettings.sword_blocking_a: Plays the legacy blocking animation when using a sword. Disabled by default; offhand blocks remain placeable when enabled.
option.ecclientsettings.server_window_fr: Allows the current server to request dark mode or colors for the native title bar. Unsupported platforms safely ignore it.
option.ecclientsettings.server_window_ti: Allows the current server to override the title shown by the game window and taskbar.
Delete Profile '%s'? Its file is preserved as a recovery copy.
screen.ecclientsettings.profiles.title: Profile Management
screen.ecclientsettings.title: EaseCation Client Settings
